## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Benchmark/evidence
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release hygiene

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy src`
- [ ] `uv build`
- [ ] `uv run --with twine twine check dist/*.tar.gz dist/*.whl`

## Notes

Mention any behavior changes, benchmark effects, public API changes, or intentionally deferred risks.
